starting_village.name: Starting Village
starting_village.description: A peaceful village where new adventurers begin their journey. The innkeeper serves warm meals and merchants offer basic equipment.

npcs.name: Elder Mira
dialogues: Safe travels, adventurer. The roads grow darker each passing day.
I've seen many young souls set out for glory. Few return unchanged.
The forest to the north whispers at night. Take heed.

npcs.name: Blacksmith Torren
dialogues: Need a blade forged? Come back when you've enough coin, friend.
Iron don't lie. A good sword outlasts its wielder every time.
I've been getting requests for stronger steel lately. Something dangerous is stirring.

your_land.name: Your Land
your_land.description: A personal plot of land where you can build and customize your home. The possibilities are endless.

forest_path.name: Dark Forest
forest_path.description: A dense forest filled with twisted trees and mysterious shadows. Strange sounds echo through the undergrowth.

npcs.name: Lost Ranger
dialogues: These woods... they've changed. Things move between the trees that shouldn't.
Watch your step. The goblins have been emboldened by something deeper in the forest.
I've been tracking a large orc warband. If you see them, run.

deep_woods.name: Deep Woods
deep_woods.description: The heart of the forest where ancient magic still lingers. Dangerous creatures prowl these shadows.

npcs.name: Forest Witch Sylva
dialogues: The trees speak to me, child. And today they speak of you.
Something ancient woke in these woods three moons ago. A hunger.
Bring me the heart of the Orc Chieftain and I shall grant you a gift.

ancient_ruins.name: Ancient Ruins
ancient_ruins.description: Remnants of a forgotten civilization. These crumbling structures hold both treasure and peril.

npcs.name: Archaeologist Voss
dialogues: Incredible! These ruins predate the kingdom by at least 800 years.
I found a sealed chamber but dare not open it alone. Would you help?
The inscriptions speak of a power locked beneath — the Shadow Seal.

underground_tombs.name: Underground Tombs
underground_tombs.description: Hidden beneath the ruins, ancient burial chambers guarded by undead warriors.

crystal_caves.name: Crystal Caves
crystal_caves.description: Glowing crystals illuminate these caverns, but dangerous elementals guard their secrets.

npcs.name: Miner Petra
dialogues: The crystals sing down here, if you listen close enough.
Lost three of my crew to the Crystal Guardian last week. We need backup.
There's a vein of void crystal deeper in. Worth a fortune — if you survive reaching it.

dragon_lair.name: Dragon's Lair
dragon_lair.description: The ultimate challenge awaits. A mighty Fire Dragon has made these mountains its home.

moonlit_glade.name: Moonlit Glade
moonlit_glade.description: A serene clearing bathed in silvery moonlight. Strange magic permeates the air here.

npcs.name: Wandering Spirit
dialogues: I walked these paths in life. In death, I cannot leave.
There is a name carved on my gravestone I no longer remember.
Seek the truth in the Haunted Cemetery. My rest depends on it.

spire_of_sorcery.name: Spire of Sorcery
spire_of_sorcery.description: An arcane tower crackling with magical energy. Only the most skilled mages can survive here.

obsidian_temple.name: Obsidian Temple
obsidian_temple.description: A dark temple of unknown purpose, hewn from black obsidian stone.

void_cavern.name: Void Cavern
void_cavern.description: A cavernous expanse where light itself seems to bend. Ancient power dwells here.

abyss_gate.name: Abyss Gate
abyss_gate.description: A gateway to the void itself. The very fabric of reality feels unstable.

echoing_void.name: Echoing Void
echoing_void.description: A silent dimension where shadows move on their own.

crystal_peaks.name: Crystal Peaks
crystal_peaks.description: Snow-capped mountains gleaming with magical resonance. The air is thin and cold.

tavern.name: The Rusty Tankard
tavern.description: A warm tavern in the heart of the town. Adventurers meet here to swap stories and hire companions.

npcs.name: Old Bard Fenwick
dialogues: Sit down, traveler! Let me sing you a tale of the Crystal Caves... and its many victims.
Gold flows like ale in this town — but only for those brave enough to earn it.
They say a ghost haunts the ancient ruins at midnight. A spirit seeking vengeance.

npcs.name: Cloaked Stranger
dialogues: You didn't see me here. And I certainly didn't see you.
There are things buried beneath these lands that should stay buried.
If you're looking for work outside the law... seek the shadow market.

swamp_of_shadows.name: Swamp of Shadows
swamp_of_shadows.description: A treacherous marsh shrouded in perpetual mist. The foul waters hide many dangerous creatures.

npcs.name: Bog Hermit
dialogues: Nobody comes to the swamp unless they're running from something or seeking something terrible.
The Swamp Hydra grows back two heads for every one you cut. Aim for the heart.
I traded my name for solitude. Don't make the same deal I did.

haunted_cemetery.name: Haunted Cemetery
haunted_cemetery.description: An ancient burial ground where restless spirits roam among crumbling tombstones.

thunder_peak.name: Thunder Peak
thunder_peak.description: A towering mountain peak perpetually shrouded in storm clouds. Lightning strikes constantly.

crypt_of_eternity.name: Crypt of Eternity
crypt_of_eternity.description: A vast underground necropolis where the most powerful undead dwell in eternal darkness.

hellfire_citadel.name: Hellfire Citadel
hellfire_citadel.description: A fortress of black stone floating in a sea of flames. Demons patrol its corridors.

sky_sanctuary.name: Sky Sanctuary
sky_sanctuary.description: A mystical floating island in the heavens, home to the most ancient and powerful creatures.

mountain_base.name: Mountain Base
mountain_base.description: The foot of the great mountain where adventurers prepare for the ascent.

port_lesben.name: Port Lesbèn
port_lesben.description: A bustling port town where ships set sail for distant lands. The salt air is thick with the cries of gulls and sailors.

npcs.name: Captain Drova
dialogues: Finest ship in the harbor, she is. Nearly lost her twice, both times to sea monsters.
Smugglers have been using these docks at night. The harbormaster turns a blind eye.
I'd pay handsomely for someone to clear the sea creatures from my usual route.

port_urkilsh.name: Port Ûrk'ilsh
port_urkilsh.description: A rugged northern port, the gateway to the frozen reaches of the continent.

elmenburg.name: Ëlmenburg
elmenburg.description: A majestic city built into the side of a mountain, known for its fine craftsmanship and ancient history.

lenbenburg.name: Lenbënburg
lenbenburg.description: The capital of the northern provinces, a fortress city that has never fallen to any foe.

outskirts_lenbenburg.name: Outskirts of Lenbënburg
outskirts_lenbenburg.description: The rolling hills and farmlands surrounding the capital, currently plagued by roaming monsters.

albeitirt_peak.name: Albéitirt Peak
albeitirt_peak.description: A jagged peak that pierces the clouds. Legend says an ancient power rests at its summit.

windswept_flower_valley.name: Windswept flower valley
windswept_flower_valley.description: A beautiful valley filled with vibrant flowers that dance in the constant, gentle breeze.

whispering_canyon.name: Whispering Canyon
whispering_canyon.description: A narrow canyon where the wind creates eerie, whisper-like sounds against the stone walls.

forgotten_oasis.name: Forgotten Oasis
forgotten_oasis.description: A hidden sanctuary in the desert, with crystal clear water and lush palm trees.

desert_of_aukrahama.name: Desert of Aukrahama
desert_of_aukrahama.description: A vast, arid desert where scorching winds and shifting sands make travel perilous.

outlaw_lands_of_bridagrak_oblast.name: Outlaw Lands of Brîdagrak Oblast
outlaw_lands_of_bridagrak_oblast.description: A lawless region where bandits and mercenaries vie for control. Danger lurks around every corner.

port_nova_terrabla.name: Port Nova Terrabla
port_nova_terrabla.description: A vibrant port city known for its exotic goods and diverse population. Adventurers gather here before setting sail towards the continent of Yixuan.

port_lianghai.name: Port LiangHai
port_lianghai.description: A bustling harbor city on the eastern coast of the continent of Yixuan, known for its seafood markets and skilled shipbuilders. From here, adventurers can embark on voyages to distant lands across the sea.

temple_of_eternity.name: Temple of Eternity
temple_of_eternity.description: An ancient temple dedicated to the gods of old, filled with puzzles and guardians protecting sacred treasures.

bamboo_forest.name: Misty Bamboo Forest
bamboo_forest.description: A serene forest of towering bamboo where ancient martial artists train. The mist conceals many secrets.

sacred_lake.name: Lake of Reflection
sacred_lake.description: A mystical lake with crystal-clear waters said to hold visions of the future. Ancient dragon turtles inhabit its depths.

dragon_temple.name: Celestial Dragon Temple
dragon_temple.description: A magnificent temple floating among the clouds, home to celestial dragons and their disciples.

thunder_mountain.name: Shattered Peaks
thunder_mountain.description: A range of jagged mountains constantly shrouded in thunderstorms. Lightning elementals roam freely.

crystal_palace.name: Crystal Palace of Yixuan
crystal_palace.description: A magnificent palace made entirely of crystal, where the emperor holds court. Glittering treasures abound.

floating_islands.name: Floating Isles of Paradise
floating_islands.description: Magical islands that float in the sky, connected by bridges of light. Home to wise sages and celestial beings.

ancient_battlefield.name: Fields of Eternal Battle
ancient_battlefield.description: A ancient battlefield where spirits of fallen warriors still fight their eternal war.

forbidden_city.name: Forbidden City of Shadows
forbidden_city.description: A city consumed by darkness, where forbidden magic was practiced. Dangerous shadows lurk in every corner.

paradise_garden.name: Garden of Eternal Blossoms
paradise_garden.description: A paradise filled with flowers that never wilt. Peaceful creatures and spirits dwell here.

paradise_sanctum.name: Sanctum of Enlightenment
paradise_sanctum.description: The highest sanctuary in Yixuan where masters seek enlightenment. The final test for true heroes.

paradise_summit.name: Summit of the Immortals
paradise_summit.description: The highest peak in Yixuan where immortal warriors train. Only the strongest may reach this place.

shadow_realm.name: Realm of Eternal Night
shadow_realm.description: A dimension of perpetual darkness where shadows hold power. Only the bravest venture here.

void_gateway.name: Gateway to the Void
void_gateway.description: A portal to the void itself. The boundary between worlds grows thin here.

true_void.name: The True Void
true_void.description: Beyond all dimensions, where even light fears to tread. The ultimate challenge awaits.

heavenly_gate.name: Heavenly Gate
heavenly_gate.description: The gateway to the celestial realm where gods reside. The final destination for worthy heroes.

celestial_realm.name: Celestial Realm
celestial_realm.description: The realm of the gods, a place of eternal beauty and power. Those who reach here are legends.

golden_temple.name: Golden Temple of Wealth
golden_temple.description: A magnificent temple made of gold and jewels, guarded by the legendary Golden Guardians.

mountain_treasury.name: Hidden Treasury
mountain_treasury.description: A vast underground treasury filled with the accumulated wealth of countless dynasties.

sacred_grove.name: Sacred Grove
sacred_grove.description: A pristine sanctuary of nature, now tainted by a dark presence.

cathedral_of_light.name: Cathedral of Light
cathedral_of_light.description: A magnificent cathedral where the most powerful holy warriors and priests used to gather.

taiga_outskirts.name: Taiga Outskirts
taiga_outskirts.description: The frigid outer edge of the Siberian taiga. Frost-covered pines stretch endlessly into the grey horizon. Siberian wolves howl in the distance and the ground crunches underfoot with permafrost. The air smells of pine resin and ice.

npcs.name: Old Trapper Voronov
dialogues: Forty winters I've walked this taiga. It gets colder every year — and meaner.
Stay on the marked paths. Off-trail, the wolves travel in packs of twelve.
I've seen tracks in the deep snow. Prints big as wagon wheels. Something lives out there.

npcs.name: Merchant Anya
dialogues: Good furs and sharp steel — that's what keeps you alive out here.
The shamans in the deep taiga don't take kindly to outsiders. Tread carefully.
Heard a rumour of a great beast in the permafrost caverns. The Snowbinable, they call it.

frozen_river.name: Frozen River
frozen_river.description: A vast river locked beneath thick, ancient ice. The banks are stalked by bears and wolverines. Strange runes are carved into the ice — warnings left by the taiga shamans of old. The ice groans beneath your feet.

npcs.name: Ice Fisher Petrov
dialogues: I fish where no one else dares. The fish under this ice are unlike any other.
Three nights ago something large walked across the ice north of here. Left craters.
The river flows to the caverns eventually. I'd not follow it if I were you.

deep_taiga.name: Deep Taiga
deep_taiga.description: The ancient heart of the Siberian forest. Twisted pines block out the sky and silence reigns except for the distant chanting of frost shamans. Snow leopards stalk the shadows between trees that have stood since before the first kingdoms.

npcs.name: Frost Elder Nadia
dialogues: You carry a strange warmth about you, outsider. The spirits notice.
The Snowbinable is not merely a beast. It is the taiga's wrath given form.
To face it, you must first survive the permafrost caverns. Few have.

permafrost_cavern.name: Permafrost Cavern
permafrost_cavern.description: A vast underground cavern carved from permafrost that has been frozen since the world was young. Ice trolls roam the crystalline halls and colossal golems of frozen earth guard the deeper passages. The cold here is absolute — even fire seems reluctant.

snowbinable_lair.name: Snowbinable's Lair
snowbinable_lair.description: A colossal ice cavern at the heart of the taiga. Every surface is coated in hoarfrost and the bones of those who came before. The air itself vibrates with ancient cold. Somewhere in the darkness, something enormous breathes. This is the domain of the Snowbinable.

port_kostantora.name: Port Kostantora
port_kostantora.description: The great gateway port of the Kalovanim Empire — and one of the most infamous places on earth. The docks reek of salt, tar, and desperation. Slave traders barter openly in the market squares while corsair ships bristle in the harbour. Chains rattle in the alleys. Kalovar soldiers patrol with cold indifference. This is the empire's dark beating heart — everything flows through here.

npcs.name: Mirza the Freed
dialogues: I bought my freedom with twenty years of service. Don't let anyone here sell yours.
The slavers here answer to the Grand Vizier. Be very careful who you anger.
There is a resistance growing in the lower city. Some of us have not forgotten what freedom tastes like.

npcs.name: Dockmaster Halil
dialogues: Keep your head down, your purse close, and your name off the Vizier's list. That's my advice.
The corsair fleet is the Sultan's fist. Barbaros commands it. Don't get on his wrong side.
Ships come and go, but the chains here are permanent for most. Welcome to Kostantora.

kostantora_docks.name: Kostantora Docks
kostantora_docks.description: The sprawling dockside district of Port Kostantora. Corsair galleys sit three-deep in the harbour. The air smells of gunpowder and salt water. Sailors brawl in taverns and the slave auctioneers call their prices from raised platforms. The Pirate Lord Barbaros holds court somewhere in here.

npcs.name: Old Corsair Yusuf
dialogues: Forty years at sea under the crescent flag. I've seen things that'd bleach your hair white.
Barbaros took this port from three rival lords in a single night. Don't underestimate him.
The best ships in the world are right here in this harbour. None of them are mine anymore.

kostantora_city.name: Kostantora: The Imperial City
kostantora_city.description: Beyond the docks lies the true Kostantora, a city of domes, spire-towers, and marble. Grand bazaars overflow with goods from every corner of the known world. Kazhari soldiers patrol every street. Kalovar architecture rises in breathtaking curves and arches. At the city's centre, the palace of Grand Vizier Karandar dominates the skyline.

npcs.name: Scholar Ibn Rashid
dialogues: The empire has stood for three hundred years. Knowledge — not swords — built it.
The Grand Vizier is the true power here. The Sultan is his symbol.
I have maps of every district in this city. For the right price, they are yours.

npcs.name: Deserter Selim
dialogues: I served the Kazhari corps for twelve years. I'd rather die poor than serve another day.
The palace guards are different from us soldiers. Fanatical. Loyal unto death.
If you're heading to the Sultan's throne room, you're either the bravest person alive or the most foolish.

grand_bazaar_district.name: The Grand Bazaar
grand_bazaar_district.description: A labyrinth of covered markets so vast you could spend a week and still not see every stall. Merchants from every nation haggle in a dozen languages. Silks, spices, weapons, and stolen goods trade hands constantly. Thieves move through the crowds like ghosts. The Grand Bazaar is the economic heart of the entire empire.

npcs.name: Merchant Omar
dialogues: The finest spices in the known world! Better than gold — at least you can eat spices.
I trade with every port from here to the far east. The empire's reach is endless.
Word is the Sultan has closed the eastern gates. Bad for business. Very bad.

kazhari_quarter.name: The Kazhari Quarter
kazhari_quarter.description: The barracks district of the legendary Kazhari corps — the Sultan's elite standing army. Drill yards echo with the clash of steel and the bark of sergeants. These are no ordinary soldiers. Taken as children, trained for decades, loyal to the empire above all else. Trespassers are treated as spies.

npcs.name: Retired Kazhari Mehmed
dialogues: I earned my retirement with forty years of blood. Don't think you can just walk in here.
The corps is the spine of this empire. Without the Kazharis, the Sultan is just a man in robes.
If you're going to the palace, the captain knows you're here. They always do.

vizier_palace.name: The Grand Vizier's Palace
vizier_palace.description: The opulent palace of Grand Vizier Karandar dominates an entire hill in Kostantora. Its walls are inlaid with lapis lazuli and gold. Palace guards stand at every doorway. Shadow dervishes patrol the corridors silently. At its heart, the Grand Vizier schemes within his private chambers.

npcs.name: Servant Girl Leyla
dialogues: Please, don't make trouble here. They'd punish all of us for your actions.
The Vizier never sleeps. He reads his scrolls through every hour of the night.
There is a passage behind the tapestry in the east hall. I never told you that.

karastani_plains.name: The Karastani Plains
karastani_plains.description: Vast golden plains stretching to the horizon, dotted with ancient ruins and grazing war horses. Desert raiders roam in packs on horseback and Karastani lions stalk the tall grasses. Kalovar cavalry patrols pass in perfect formation. This land has been conquered and reconquered a hundred times — every hill hides the memory of a battle.

npcs.name: Nomad Elder Ayse
dialogues: These plains have been free land since before the empire existed. It will be free again.
The war elephants are brought from the far south. Terrifying in battle, gentle in peace.
The desert beyond the mountains hides ruins older than any empire. Strange things live there.

kapali_mountains.name: The Kapali Mountains
kapali_mountains.description: A rugged, cloud-wreathed mountain range forming the empire's eastern spine. Desert serpents nest in the rocky passes and shadow dervishes have established hidden mountain shrines. The mountain fortresses of the Kazharis command every valley. Few cross these mountains without permission — or without a fight.

desert_of_ankhara.name: The Desert of Ankhara
desert_of_ankhara.description: An endless sea of burning sand beyond the mountains. The heat is absolute. Desert serpents grow enormous in these wastes and war elephants are herded through in great caravans. Ancient Kalovar fortresses half-buried in sand hold secrets the empire would prefer forgotten. At its far edge, the Sultan's private hunting grounds begin.

sultan_hunting_grounds.name: The Sultan's Hunting Grounds
sultan_hunting_grounds.description: A vast enclosed wilderness maintained for the Sultan's pleasure. Only the finest — and most dangerous — creatures roam here: Karastani lions, enormous desert serpents, and war elephants trained for battle. The Sultan himself hunts here when affairs of state permit. Trespassers are executed on sight.

sultan_palace.name: The Sultan's Throne Room
sultan_palace.description: The most forbidden chamber in the Kalovanim Empire. Walls of white marble rise forty feet above a floor inlaid with the empire's map in gold. The Sultan's throne is carved from a single block of onyx. Sultanate banners hang from every column. Palace guards line every wall in perfect silence. Sultan Velkar waits at the far end. He has known you were coming for some time.

the_coldwater_crossing.name: The Coldwater Crossing
the_coldwater_crossing.description: The northern border where the Coldwater River divides Kalovar-held lands from the Varak steppe. Fort ruins and old treaty markers line the bank. Varak raiders cross in winter when the ice holds. Kalovar border scouts patrol the southern bank. This is the place where three wars started and one ended.

npcs.name: Treaty Keeper Aldo
dialogues: This crossing has been at peace for forty years. Someone is testing that now.
The Varak don't raid without reason. Find the reason and you find the solution.
I've been stationed here twelve years. I know every stone of this riverbank.

varak_iron_steppe.name: The Varak Iron Steppe
varak_iron_steppe.description: The endless grass ocean of the northern continent where the Varak clans roam. The wind never stops. Clan totem poles mark territory boundaries. Berserkers train in the open air, their war-cries carrying for miles. Moving camps appear and vanish overnight. This is where the iron horde was born.

npcs.name: Zevari Singer Brynja
dialogues: The songs remember everything the clan has ever done. Including what they would rather forget.
You travel alone across the steppe. Either brave or foolish. Perhaps both.
The war-chief does not trust outsiders. Bring him proof of strength if you want an audience.

greymount_clan_hold.name: Greymount Clan Hold
greymount_clan_hold.description: The great fortified encampment of the Greymount clan, largest of the Varak Confederation. Timber walls thirty feet high enclose longhouses, forge-yards, and a central fire that never goes out. Bear Warrior sentries guard every gate. The clan-chief rules from the mead hall at its heart.

npcs.name: Clan Healer Sigrid
dialogues: We heal the ones the steppe hasn't killed yet. Come back when you have wounds worth treating.
The Bear Warriors drink a preparation before battle. I make it. I'm the only one who knows the recipe.
Our stockpiles are running low. If you can bring us eastern medicines, you'd earn real gratitude.

rivers_crown.name: River's Crown
rivers_crown.description: The greatest city in the known world and capital of the Yixuan river kingdoms. Tier upon tier of lacquered red-and-gold architecture rises above the Yi Xuan River. The Imperial Palace occupies an entire district. The Examination Hall draws scholars from across the continent. The market quarter never closes. Jade Court Assassins move silently through every crowd.

npcs.name: Scholar Wei Linhua
dialogues: The Examination Hall has stood for eight centuries. I have sat for the high examinations four times.
River's Crown is the largest city in the world. Getting lost here is a real risk. I speak from experience.
The Jade Court Assassins answer to the Imperial Censor. Do not ask questions about that office.

npcs.name: Shrine Keeper Mei
dialogues: We honour the Silkworm Empress at this shrine every morning. She gave us silk. Silk is everything.
The old city was different before the current dynasty. Many things changed. Not all for the worse.
If you seek the Ghost River, go south along the eastern bank. But go in daylight.

ghost_river_stretch.name: The Ghost River
ghost_river_stretch.description: A three-mile stretch of the Yi Xuan River where the water runs black. An ancient battle was fought here eight hundred years ago. The locals will not fish it. Boatmen will not linger. Something moves beneath the dark water and voices speak in accents no one has heard in living memory. A monk's temple burns offerings at the bank every evening.

npcs.name: Brother Chen of the River Temple
dialogues: We burn offerings every sunset. The spirits have not troubled us in three years. I will not stop now.
Do not cross the black water at night. This is not superstition. This is accumulated experience.
Something has stirred the deep river spirits recently. I need a brave soul to investigate.

jade_examination_hall.name: The Jade Examination Hall
jade_examination_hall.description: The most prestigious institution in the eastern world. Stone examination cells line endless corridors. Scholars in grey robes move in silence. Jade automata patrol the vaults where centuries of examination records are kept. The Grand Examiner has held the post for forty years. Thieves and cheats are caught with disturbing regularity.

npcs.name: Grand Examiner Zhao
dialogues: The examination is the foundation of this empire. Touch nothing in this hall without permission.
Someone has been selling examination positions. I have been looking for them for six months.
If you can find the corruption, I can offer you access to the great archive. Every document of the last four centuries.

spine_of_heaven_pass.name: Spine of Heaven Pass
spine_of_heaven_pass.description: The highest navigable crossing through the Spine of Heaven mountain range that divides the eastern interior from the coast. Perpetual ice, screaming winds, and strange creatures that exist nowhere else in the world. The northern mountain clans guard the lower approaches. Something ancient watches from the peaks above.

npcs.name: Mountain Clan Guide Tara
dialogues: I have led three crossings of this pass. Two of those groups made it across complete.
The ice spirits are hungry this season. We must bring offerings or they will take one of us instead.
Past the third peak there is a valley that does not appear on any map I have seen. I do not go there.

ruins_of_constanplea.name: Ruins of Constanplea
ruins_of_constanplea.description: The lower quarter of Kostantora where the old Byzantra city still lies beneath the surface — half-excavated, half-buried, wholly haunted. Ghost legionnaires patrol walls that no longer stand above ground. The remnant of the Church of the Eternal Flame juts from the earth like a broken tooth. Scholars dig here and occasionally do not return.

npcs.name: Archaeologist Theodora
dialogues: The old city is still here under everything. The Kalovars built on top rather than clear it away.
I've found three sections of the old imperial library. Most of it burned, but not all.
The ghost legionnaires patrol the same routes they walked in life. Learn the routes and you can avoid them.
